description: Product Description Get ready to achieve bouncy and voluminous curls with xnicx Hair Rollers Bendy Flexi Rods. These heatless curlers are perfect for those who want gorgeous curls without damaging their hair. These rollers are made of foam and are incredibly flexible, making them easy to use on any hair length and texture. The velcro rollers for hair are comfortable to wear and won't tug on your hair, so you can easily sleep with them on. These rollers for hair volume come in a set of 47, so you can use them all over your head for full coverage. Use the flexi rods to create natural-looking curls that last all day. Get your set today and start enjoying beautiful curls that last all day! How to Use? Introducing our Hair Curling Rods, the perfect tool to achieve the curls of your dreams! Follow these simple instructions to get the best results: 1. Comb your freshly washed hair and divide it into sections. . Start by wrapping the ends of your hair around the rod and rotating your hair around the same area 1 or 2 times. 2. Wrap sections of hair around rods. Fold the ends of the rods down to secure them in place. For larger curls : Purple and Blue Rods. For medium curls : Yellow, Orange and Green Rods. For small curls : Pink and Red rods. 3. Allow your hair to air dry or use a hair dryer to ensure it is completely dry before taking out the rod. 4. Keep the rod fixed for about 2 hours and spray your hair with a styling spray for better results. 5. When removing the rod, bend the ends back up and unravel in the opposite direction. Twirl the ends of the curl around your finger to eliminate frizz. The flexible iron inside the rod is more flexible and changeable to meet various curling needs. Hair Rollers set include 7 colors & 7 sizes:1.98cm,1.77cm,1.6cm,1.39cm,1.19cm,0.99cm,0.78cm. Make of soft foam ,flexible and comfy to wear.
